summary: Iteration 126: Drag-and-Drop Scene Reordering and Continuity Director V2 testing complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All drag-and-drop UI elements verified - 31 scene cards, 31 drag handles (GripVertical icons), 31 sortable wrappers, 0 old move buttons (correctly removed), 31 delete buttons, 32 add-scene buttons. Continuity Director status endpoint returns complete analysis with 87 issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend: SortableSceneWrapper component properly implements useSortable hook (lines 21-35)
Frontend: DndContext and SortableContext correctly wrap scene list (lines 1527-1528, 1757-1758)
Frontend: handleDragEnd callback uses arrayMove and persists to backend (lines 802-823)
Frontend: Drag handles (GripVertical) only shown when !screenplayApproved (lines 1618-1622)
Frontend: Old move-up/move-down buttons completely removed from codebase
Frontend: Delete and add-scene buttons still work alongside drag handles
Backend: GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/continuity/status returns continuity_status and continuity_report
Backend: continuity_report.issues array contains detailed issue objects with severity, category, character, description, correction fields
seed_data_creation: Used existing project d27afb0e79ff (ADÃO E EVA - BIBLIZOO 2 - 31 scenes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 126 complete. Drag-and-drop scene reordering feature fully verified. Old Up/Down move buttons (move-scene-up-*, move-scene-down-*) have been completely removed and replaced with GripVertical drag handles. Drag handles are hidden when screenplay is approved. Continuity Director V2 status endpoint working - returns analysis with 87 issues found for test project. Test project d27afb0e79ff has 31 scenes.
